# Module Navigation Map

## Modules and Links (Demo)

| Module key | Label | Demo href |
|------------|-------|-----------|
| dashboard | Dashboard | erp-app-shell-demo.php |
| customers | Customers | #customers-demo |
| vehicles | Vehicles | #vehicles-demo |
| jobcards | JobCards | erp-jobcard-part-readonly-list.php |
| service_operations | Service Operations | erp-service-operation-readonly-list.php |
| parts_inventory | Parts / Inventory | erp-stock-readonly-list.php |
| purchase_requests | Purchase Requests | erp-purchase-request-readonly-list.php |
| payments | Payments | erp-payment-readonly-list.php |
| qc | QC | erp-qc-check.php |
| delivery | Delivery | erp-delivery-control.php |
| soft_run_gate | Soft Run Gate | erp-soft-run-readiness.php |

## Note
Links to existing ERP prototype pages are navigation only — M32 does not modify those pages.

## Final Map Decision
Eleven modules mapped to foundation PHP pages where available.
